title: classroom50/classroom/v1
description: Machine-readable schema for <classroom>/classroom.json, the per-classroom metadata scaffolded by `gh teacher classroom add` (cli/gh-teacher/classroom.go, classroomJSON). Hand-authored classrooms omit `migrated_from`; only `gh teacher classroom migrate` writes it.

short_name.description: URL/path-safe slug; the directory name under the config repo and the Pages path segment.

term.description: Free-form term label (e.g. "Fall 2026"); may be empty.

org.description: The GitHub organization login that owns this classroom.

migrated_from.description: Provenance written only by `gh teacher classroom migrate`.

team.description: The per-classroom GitHub team (created by `gh teacher classroom add`/`migrate`) that grants rostered students read on private, org-owned assignment templates. Omitted on classrooms created before this feature.

id.description: Immutable GitHub team id; the handle `classroom remove` deletes by.

slug.description: GitHub team slug; the authoritative addressing key for membership and repo-grant operations.
